Arthralgia.Definition: A disorder characterized by a sensation of marked discomfort in a joint.
Arthralgia.Grade 3: Severe pain; limiting self care ADL

Arthritis.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation of a joint.
Arthritis.Grade 1: Mild pain with inflammation, erythema, or joint swelling
Arthritis.Grade 2: Moderate pain associated with signs of inflammation, erythema, or joint swelling; limiting instrumental ADL
Arthritis.Grade 3: Severe pain associated with signs of inflammation, erythema, or joint swelling; irreversible joint damage; limiting self care ADL

Myalgia.Definition: A disorder characterized by marked discomfort sensation originating from a muscle or group of muscles.
Myalgia.Grade 3: Severe pain; limiting self care ADL

Myositis.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation of the muscle.
Myositis.Grade 2: Moderate pain associated with weakness; pain limiting instrumental ADL
Myositis.Grade 3: Pain associated with severe weakness; limiting self care ADL

Polymyalgia rheumatica.Definition: A disorder characterized by stiffness and pain in the muscles of the neck, shoulder, and pelvic girdle.
Polymyalgia rheumatica.Grade 1: Mild pain; no decrease in range of motion (ROM)

Rhabdomyolysis.Definition: A disorder characterized by the breakdown of muscle tissue with leakage of muscle contents into the bloodstream.
Rhabdomyolysis.Grade 3: Creatine kinase increase >10 x ULN with signs or symptoms of muscle breakdown
